headline: NRG Energy Inc (NRG) Stock Price Target Raised. Get the Bigger Picture
summary: NRG Energy Inc (NYSE:NRG) is one of billionaire Lee Ainslie’s stocks with huge upside potential. Analysts believe NRG Energy shares could soar more than 58% over the next 12 months from the current level.
